hero.description: CR Collective is a Mexico-based architecture studio exploring how design, documentation and construction intelligence can create spaces that are beautiful, useful and buildable.

servicesPage.title: A design-build journey shaped by clarity, BIM intelligence and site strategy.
servicesPage.subtitle: CR Collective structures architecture, documentation, visualization and construction thinking into one legible path from brief to buildable decisions.
servicesPage.indexTitle: A technical sequence, not a menu of isolated tasks.
servicesPage.indexCopy: Each service is designed to connect with the next one, keeping intent, information and execution aligned as the project moves forward.
servicesPage.service1.title: Architecture
servicesPage.service1.body: Spatial strategy, program and architectural direction shaped around site, use and ambition.
servicesPage.service1.output: Design criteria, program logic, spatial direction
servicesPage.service2.title: Concept Design
servicesPage.service2.body: Early massing, atmosphere and layout decisions translated into a clear conceptual direction.
servicesPage.service2.output: Concept package, diagrams, mood and volumetric studies
servicesPage.service3.title: BIM + Documentation
servicesPage.service3.body: Coordinated models and drawing sets that make the project understandable, measurable and buildable.
servicesPage.service3.output: BIM model, drawings, schedules and coordination notes
servicesPage.service4.title: Visualization
servicesPage.service4.body: Images and walkthrough logic that help clients, collaborators and decision makers read the space before construction.
servicesPage.service4.output: Renders, visual studies and presentation sequences
about.title: CR Collective
about.statement: A founder-led architecture studio connecting design intent, BIM documentation, visualization and site intelligence.
about.intro: We are a collaborative architecture and visualization studio. We design and coordinate contemporary projects with BIM methodology to ensure coherence between concept, documentation, and execution. We operate as a work network with architects and civil engineers, integrating structure and MEP to deliver buildable, efficient solutions aligned with budget. Our approach: clear scope, orderly processes, and constant communication with the client.
about.fact1.label: Focus
about.fact2.label: Base
about.fact3.label: Model
about.manifesto.title: We do not separate the image of architecture from the intelligence required to build it.
about.manifesto.body: CR Collective works at the intersection of concept, documentation and execution. Each project is treated as a set of decisions that must remain clear for clients, consultants and builders.
about.mission.title: Mission
about.mission.body: Create contemporary spaces that respond to real needs through transparent processes, constant communication, and informed decisions.
about.values.title: Values
about.values.heading: How the studio keeps projects legible.
about.value1.title: Clear scope
about.value1.body: We define scope, costs, deliverables and responsibilities before the project gains speed.
about.value2.title: Collaborative precision
about.value2.body: We coordinate with clients, consultants and builders through structured information instead of assumptions.
about.value3.title: BIM responsibility
about.value3.body: We use BIM and precise documentation to reduce ambiguity and support buildable decisions.
about.value4.title: Context intelligence
about.value4.body: We design with attention to climate, operation, site constraints and the future life of the project.
about.team.title: Team
about.team.heading: A compact studio with an expandable technical network.
about.capability1.title: Architecture
about.capability1.body: Concept, program, space and material criteria.
about.capability2.title: Documentation
about.capability3.title: Visualization
about.capability3.body: Images and sequences that clarify decisions.
about.capability4.title: Site logic
about.capability4.body: Construction criteria, sequencing and practical review.
contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Tell us what you are planning. We review each inquiry carefully to understand scope, stage and potential.
contact.form.name: Name
contact.form.error: ❌ Could not send. Please try again or email us directly.
project.detail.conceptBody: Contemporary spatial composition with volumetric clarity and controlled natural light.
project.detail.bimBody: Coordinated BIM model to align design intent, documentation and constructability.
project.detail.materialityBody: Muted materials and robust textures calibrated for warmth, durability and contrast.
project.detail.programBody: Social core, double-height living spaces and clear vertical circulation hierarchy.
project.detail.galleryBody: A sequence of interior and exterior moments composed as an architectural narrative.
thankyou.title: Thank you — we received your message.
thankyou.message: We’ll contact you shortly to understand your project and share next steps.
thankyou.next.title: Next steps
thankyou.note: If you don’t hear back, please check your spam folder.
founder.title: An architectural vision with a human focus
founder.quote: We do not design to impress algorithms. We design clear, functional, and memorable spaces for real people.
founder.description: Led by Cristhian Gómez Hernández, the studio connects architectural design, BIM documentation, visualization and construction-site experience into one clear process.
founder.name: Cristhian Gómez Hernández
testimonials.title: What our clients say
testimonials.description: This space will feature verified reviews, project experiences, and references from clients who have worked with CR Collective.
testimonials.google.title: Verified reviews (Google Reviews)
testimonials.google.subtitle: Selection of real reviews from CR Collective’s business profile.
testimonials.card1.quote: Excellent clarity throughout the process and a strong ability to visualize practical solutions.
testimonials.card2.quote: Order, clean deliverables, and direct communication.
testimonials.card3.quote: Professional guidance and design decisions grounded in budget reality.
clients.title: Clients and collaborations
about.team.body: CR Collective is a multidisciplinary team that brings together architecture, design, visualization, and technical development to shape clear, well-considered, and carefully executed projects. Under the direction of Cristhian Gómez Hernández, the studio coordinates diverse collaborative capabilities to respond to each project with a contemporary vision, technical precision, and spatial sensitivity.
servicesPage.service5.title: Site Strategy
servicesPage.service5.body: Construction logic, sequencing and site constraints reviewed before they become expensive surprises.
servicesPage.service5.output: Execution criteria, site priorities and buildability review
servicesPage.service6.title: Project Communication
servicesPage.service6.body: A clear rhythm of updates, documents and decisions so every participant understands what changes and why.
servicesPage.service6.output: Decision records, review notes and client-facing summaries
servicesPage.methodTitle: A disciplined path from first conversation to site strategy.
servicesPage.method1.title: Brief
servicesPage.method1.body: We define scope, location, project stage, constraints and the decisions that must be resolved first.
servicesPage.method2.title: Concept
servicesPage.method2.body: We establish spatial direction, priorities, atmosphere and the main design criteria.
servicesPage.method3.title: BIM model
servicesPage.method3.body: We organize the project into coordinated information that supports drawings, quantities and reviews.
servicesPage.method4.title: Visualization
servicesPage.method4.body: We test how the project is read through material, light, scale and presentation imagery.
servicesPage.method5.title: Construction strategy
servicesPage.method5.body: We translate design decisions into sequencing, site priorities and practical next steps.
servicesPage.finalTitle: Tell us what you want to build.
servicesPage.finalCopy: The first contact happens by email so we can review scope, location, project stage and the kind of support your project needs.
project.detail.emptyBody: This project is being documented for publication. Selected drawings, renders and construction records will be integrated as the archive evolves.
footer.statement: CR Collective is a founder-led architecture studio working across design, BIM documentation, visualization and construction intelligence.
clients.copy: Brands, partners, and teams we have collaborated with in residential, commercial, cultural, and institutional projects.
footer.cta.title: Do you have a project in mind?
footer.cta.copy: We design, document, and visualize architectural projects with technical clarity, spatial criteria, and careful representation.
thesis.body: CR Collective operates between design vision and buildable precision — transforming ideas into spaces that can be imagined, documented, coordinated and executed.
thesis.title: Architecture becomes valuable when spatial character, technical intelligence and site decisions move as one system.
thesis.description: We shape each commission as a clear sequence: concept, BIM logic, material atmosphere and execution strategy aligned before the project reaches site.
thesis.pillar1.title: Spatial character
thesis.pillar1.body: Proportion, light and material intent give each project a memorable architectural identity.
thesis.pillar2.title: BIM intelligence
thesis.pillar2.body: Coordinated models transform design ambition into information that can be reviewed, priced and built.
thesis.pillar3.title: Site strategy
thesis.pillar3.body: Construction logic, sequence and real-site constraints inform decisions from the first concept.
approach.title: Architecture with editorial clarity and technical intelligence.
approach.body: We structure each project as a narrative: design direction, BIM logic and site intelligence in one coherent process.
approach.pillar1.title: Design clarity
approach.pillar1.body: Proportion, material intent and spatial hierarchy from the first concept.
approach.pillar2.title: BIM documentation
approach.pillar2.body: Coordinated information that supports decisions, permits and execution.
approach.pillar3.title: Site intelligence
approach.pillar3.body: Constructive criteria shaped by context, sequence and real-site conditions.
